quests.title: First Specimen, First Sin
quests.description: High Seeker Elara Voss has inducted you into the Arcanum Seekers — the faction the Concordium calls reckless and the Iron Hegemony calls dangerous, and who call themselves the only people on Xylos who are asking the right questions. The Crystal Slope's Wild Mushrooms absorb raw aethel from the Shard fragment impact site nearby, storing energy signatures that predate the Great Severance. The Arcanum needs those signatures. Knowledge has a price, and it begins here. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

objectives.description: Defeat Wild Mushrooms and extract their mystic energy.

quests.title: Does the Crystal Dream
quests.description: Crystal Sproutlings grow from Shard fragment deposits — they are, technically, living extensions of the same material that was shattered during the Great Severance. (Location: Crystal Slope, Scholar Elara) High Seeker Elara Voss believes they possess a rudimentary Aethelgardian-coded consciousness, a biological memory of the world before the Siphon overloaded. The Arcanum does not apologize for how it learns. Engage them. Collect what remains.

quests.title: The Living Archive
quests.description: Archivist Sylas — the Arcanum's keeper of specimens and secrets — has a theory: Shardlings are not random creatures but fractal echoes of the original Aethel Shard, each one containing a tiny portion of the Shard's encoded memory. (Location: Crystal Slope, Archivist Sylas) The Concordium wants to regulate the Shard. The Arcanum wants to read it. Bring Sylas enough Shardlings and he will begin to translate what the Shard is trying to say.

objectives.description: Capture Shardling fragments for the archive.

quests.title: Ghosts of the Aethelgardians
quests.description: An Aethelgardian text recovered from the Resonance Caverns — one of the Arcanum's most prized possessions — describes the Crystal Wisps as 'light-formed messengers, carrying the speech of those who built the Siphon.' High Seeker Elara Voss believes every Wisp that flickers out is a word from before the Severance, lost forever. (Location: Crystal Slope, Scholar Elara) She wants their energy signatures captured before that language is gone entirely. The methodology is unfortunate but necessary.

objectives.description: Contain Crystal Wisps for energy analysis.

quests.title: The Spire Calls to You
quests.description: The Observatory Spire is the Arcanum's crown jewel — a tower built to watch the stars and read the aethel currents that flow between them. Archsage Myr has reviewed your field reports and called you to the Spire in person. In the Arcanum, knowledge specialization is not a promotion; it is a philosophical declaration of what questions you will spend your life pursuing. Choose carefully. The wrong answer will not be punished — but it will define you.

objectives.description: Speak with Archsage Myr at the Observatory Spire. (Archsage Myr at Observatory Spire Academy)
Demonstrate your arcane potential against Wild Mushrooms.

quests.title: The Shattered Laboratory
quests.description: The Fractured Glass Valley was an Aethelgardian research station before the Severance shattered it — and the terrain along with it. High Seeker Elara Voss has been trying to get a team in here for years, but the Concordium kept classifying it restricted. Now, post-Schism, in the chaos of competing factions, the Arcanum moves. The data slates buried in the glass are worth more than the annual budget of most research divisions. Get in before anyone else does. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: How the Glass Learns to Walk
quests.description: Glass Crawlers evolved in the Fractured Glass Valley over generations, developing reinforced chitin that lets them move through razor-edged terrain that cuts through standard armor plating in minutes. Archivist Sylas believes their locomotion pattern is derived from Aethelgardian nano-structure principles — essentially, the creatures stumbled into a solution the ancient engineers spent centuries developing. Their movement data could redefine Arcanum field equipment design. Collect specimens carefully.

objectives.description: Neutralize Glass Crawlers and record movement patterns.

quests.title: The Rat in the Archive
quests.description: A Giant Alpha Rat has made the valley's sealed archive chamber its nest — the chamber that Arcanum scouts confirmed contains pre-Severance data cylinders still intact after centuries. (Location: Fractured Glass Valley, Scholar Elara) High Seeker Elara Voss's voice is tight when she explains this. The Concordium had this chamber on their survey maps for decades and left it sealed. The Arcanum broke through last season. A rat will not reclaim what human curiosity has finally unlocked.

objectives.description: Defeat the Giant Alpha Rat in the archive chamber.

quests.title: Complexity in the Shards
quests.description: Glass Wisps are what Crystal Wisps become after generations of exposure to the valley's compressed aethel radiation — their energy signatures have grown so complex that Researcher Vin's field equipment can barely parse them. (Location: Fractured Glass Valley, Researcher Vin) This is exactly why the Arcanum exists. Every other faction on Xylos sees these creatures as obstacles. The Arcanum sees them as data points in the longest experiment in history: what does the Severance eventually become?

quests.title: Horns of the Old Current
quests.description: Crystal Rams grow their horns by absorbing the deep aethel currents that flow through the valley's crystalline substrate — the same currents that once powered Aethelgardian technology. (Location: Fractured Glass Valley, Scholar Elara) Their horns are essentially biological aethel conduits, grown over decades into shapes that mirror the original Siphon's internal architecture. High Seeker Elara Voss wants two of them for a reconstruction project she has never shared with the Concordium and never will.

objectives.description: Defeat Crystal Rams in the deep ravine.

quests.title: The Caverns That Speak
quests.description: The Resonance Caverns were discovered by an Arcanum expedition three years ago — and immediately classified by the Concordium, who found the frequency emissions 'destabilizing to infrastructure.' What that really means, High Seeker Elara Voss explains, is that the Concordium is afraid of what the caverns are saying. The frequencies match Aethelgardian communication protocols last recorded three hundred years before the Severance. The Arcanum is listening now. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: Interference Pattern
quests.description: Resonance Bats have adapted to use the caverns' Aethelgardian frequency emissions as their primary navigation signal — which means when they pulse their own echolocation, it creates harmonic interference that drowns out the original signal the Arcanum is trying to record. (Location: Resonance Caverns, Researcher Vin) Researcher Vin is philosophical about it: 'They evolved into the frequency stream like we evolved into language.' He still needs them neutralized before the interference destroys another month of data collection.

objectives.description: Defeat Resonance Bats in the caverns.

quests.title: Guardians of a Forgotten Archive
quests.description: Resonance Golems were not born — they were built, by Aethelgardian architects who understood acoustics as a force as real as gravity. (Location: Resonance Caverns, Scholar Elara) They still guard the cavern's deeper chambers, still following protocols written before Xylos had a recorded history. High Seeker Elara Voss reads the technical specifications in their construction with open hunger: 'They solved in stone what we have not solved in silicon.' She needs them disabled — and every component catalogued.

quests.title: The Proof in the Stone
quests.description: Archivist Sylas has mapped the echo patterns in the deepest cavern chambers and believes they form a recursive mathematical structure — a proof, encoded in reflected sound, that describes the fundamental resonance equation underlying aethel energy transfer. (Location: Resonance Caverns, Archivist Sylas) If he is right, this single proof is worth more than the entire Concordium's engineering database. The Bats that keep disrupting his recordings have earned a very specific kind of contempt from a very quiet man.

objectives.description: Clear Bats from the echo chambers. [Resonance Bat]

quests.title: What the Signal Hides
quests.description: Something is actively corrupting the Aethelgardian signal in the Resonance Caverns — not random interference, but a structured counter-harmonic that High Seeker Elara Voss describes as deliberate suppression. Something in the deep chambers does not want the signal heard. The Golems are amplifying the suppression, and the Bats are spreading it. Elara's eyes are bright with exactly the kind of dangerous curiosity that made the Concordium classify her research six times. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

objectives.description: Destroy Golems causing harmonic interference. [Resonance Golem]
Eliminate Bat swarms amplifying the interference. [Resonance Bat]

quests.title: The Unmapped Chambers
quests.description: Archivist Sylas's cartography of the Resonance Caverns has revealed sections that do not appear on any map — not Concordium survey maps, not Iron Hegemony mineral charts, not even the speculative Arcanum projections. Sealed chambers, acoustically isolated, with energy signatures that spike and then vanish whenever a detection instrument approaches. Whatever is in there chose to be unfindable. The Arcanum has chosen to find it anyway.

objectives.description: Clear hostiles from unmapped sectors. [Resonance Bat]

quests.title: What Was Meant to Stay Sealed
quests.description: The sealed chamber Archivist Sylas found is not just locked — it was engineered to resist entry, with Golem guardians reactivating every time a breach is attempted. (Location: Resonance Caverns, Scholar Elara) The Aethelgardians sealed something here deliberately, which means they knew it needed to be contained. High Seeker Elara Voss's response to this is characteristic: 'Everything that was sealed was sealed by someone who was also afraid of knowing. We are not afraid.' Breach the chamber. Document everything.

objectives.description: Collect arcane crystal fragment (x2). [Item: Arcane Crystal Fragment]
Defeat Golems guarding the chamber. [Resonance Golem]

quests.title: The Voice of the Aethelgardians
quests.description: The artifacts from the sealed chamber contain Aethelgardian language fragments in a dialect that Archivist Sylas has never seen — older than the Siphon's construction era, possibly older than anything in the Arcanum's database. (Location: Resonance Caverns, Scholar Elara) High Seeker Elara Voss has begun a real-time translation and she cannot be interrupted. The Golems are fighting back. The Bats are swarming. Someone — or something — does not want those words spoken aloud again.

objectives.description: Defend the translation site from Golem assault. [Resonance Golem]
Eliminate Bats disrupting the ritual. [Resonance Bat]

quests.title: The Sum of Lost Knowledge
quests.description: The Resonance Echo that formed in the deepest chamber is not a creature in any biological sense — it is the caverns' accumulated Aethelgardian data coalesced into a coherent energy entity, the same phenomenon the ancient texts called 'a dreaming archive.' The Arcanum has theorized about this. (Location: Resonance Caverns, Scholar Elara) High Seeker Elara Voss has written three papers about the theoretical possibility. She is almost incapable of hiding her awe as she orders you to defeat it and extract its data core.

objectives.description: Destroy Golems shielding the Echo. [Resonance Golem]

quests.title: The Spire Opens Its Deeper Doors
quests.description: The Resonance Echo's data core is being analyzed in the Observatory Spire's highest laboratory. High Seeker Elara Voss has called you back — not with orders, but with something closer to an invitation. The Arcanum's restricted archives, the ones the Concordium tried to confiscate twice, are being opened for your Advanced evaluation. What you learned in the Caverns was just the beginning. The Spire's deeper doors require a key that can only be earned, not given. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: Forbidden Zones
quests.description: The Shard Pulse Peak is a forbidden research zone. Ancient machines still operate there, pulsing with unknowable energy. The Arcanum has authorized your entry. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

objectives.description: Ascend to the Shard Pulse Peak.

quests.title: Sentinel Disruption
quests.description: Shard Pulse Sentinels patrol the peak's machine platforms. (Location: Shard Pulse Peak, Watcher Vane) Their energy signatures suggest they are guardians of dormant technology.

objectives.description: Disable Shard Pulse Sentinels for analysis.
Collect arcane crystal fragment (x2). [Item: Arcane Crystal Fragment]

quests.title: Guardian Protocols
quests.description: Shard Pulse Guardians are elite Sentinel variants. (Location: Shard Pulse Peak, Watcher Vane) They protect the peak's central machine. Disable them and access the machine's data terminal.

quests.title: Leviathan's Depth
quests.description: A Sunken Aethel Leviathan has been detected in the peak's subterranean lake. (Location: Shard Pulse Peak, Researcher Vin) Its biology may hold secrets of Aethel conversion. Capture tissue samples.

quests.title: Tyrant's Pulse
quests.description: The Shard Pulse Tyrant is the apex guardian of the peak. (Location: Shard Pulse Peak, Scholar Elara) Its energy signature matches Precursor command protocols. Disable it to access the master terminal.

quests.title: Storm Serpent
quests.description: A Storm Rift Serpent has been drawn to the peak's energy. (Location: Shard Pulse Peak, Researcher Vin) These creatures ride electromagnetic currents. Harvest its scales for the Arcanum's armory.

quests.title: Celestial Observation
quests.description: The Aethel Storm Belt is a contested zone of intense electromagnetic activity. The Arcanum seeks to establish an observation post to study celestial phenomena. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: Storm Wranglers
quests.description: Storm Rift Serpents dominate the Storm Belt. (Location: Aethel Storm Belt, Researcher Vin) Their electromagnetic nature disrupts our instruments. Thin their population.

objectives.description: Defeat Storm Rift Serpents in the Belt.

quests.title: Leviathan Hunt
quests.description: Multiple Sunken Aethel Leviathans have migrated into the Storm Belt. (Location: Aethel Storm Belt, Scholar Elara) Their migration pattern is unprecedented — and dangerous to the observation post.

objectives.description: Defeat Leviathans threatening the observation post. [Sunken Aethel Leviathan]

quests.title: The Second Ascension
quests.description: Archsage Myr has determined you are ready for Ascension. Return to the Observatory Spire for the arcane elevation ritual.

objectives.description: Report to Archsage Myr for Ascension evaluation. (Archsage Myr at Observatory Spire Academy)
Defeat the Resonance Echo to prove your arcane growth.
Defeat a Shard Pulse Tyrant as your advanced trial.

quests.title: Orbital Ambitions
quests.description: The Arcanum Seekers require access to orbital platforms. Knowledge of the heavens is the next frontier. Establish our presence at the Orbital Sentinel Command. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: Celestial Hunt
quests.description: The Ashen Drake has been sighted from orbit. The Arcanum needs direct observation data. Track the Drake in the Cradle Expanse. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

objectives.description: Engage and observe the Ashen Drake. Survival is sufficient.

quests.title: Behemoth Study
quests.description: Aethel Behemoths possess unusual regenerative properties. (Location: Cradle Expanse, Researcher Vin) The Arcanum believes their biology can unlock new alchemical formulas.

objectives.description: Defeat Aethel Behemoths for tissue samples.
Collect raw aethel core (x2). [Item: Raw Aethel Core]

quests.title: Void Alchemy
quests.description: Aethel Void Channelers are conducting void-alchemical rituals. (Location: Cradle Expanse, Scholar Elara) Steal their research — it may contain the key to void energy transmutation.

objectives.description: Interrupt the void-alchemical rituals. [Aethel Void Channeler]
Collect void channeler core (x2). [Item: Void Channeler Core]

quests.title: Abyssal Specimen
quests.description: Aethel Abyssal Reavers are creatures of pure void energy. (Location: Cradle Expanse, Researcher Vin) The Arcanum requires a live essence sample for the restricted archive.

objectives.description: Defeat Abyssal Reavers and extract essence. [Aethel Abyssal Reaver]
Collect void channeler core (x1). [Item: Void Channeler Core]

quests.title: Archive Defense
quests.description: Rival factions are probing Arcanum orbital archives. (Location: Orbital Sentinel Command, Archivist Sylas) The knowledge stored here must be protected at all costs.

objectives.description: Repel intruders from the orbital archives. [Aethel Rift Stalker]

quests.title: Drake's Alchemy
quests.description: The Ashen Drake's fire contains unique alchemical properties. (Location: Cradle Expanse, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum must obtain a fresh flame sample — directly from the source if necessary.

objectives.description: Confront the Ashen Drake for a flame sample.

quests.title: Corrupted Research
quests.description: Aethel Corrupted Behemoths are the result of failed void experiments by rival factions. (Location: Cradle Expanse, Researcher Vin) Clean up their mess and collect the corrupted data.

quests.title: Abyssal Raid
quests.description: Multiple Abyssal Reavers threaten to overrun the orbital research stations. (Location: Cradle Expanse, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum cannot afford to lose decades of orbital data.

objectives.description: Defeat the Abyssal Reaver assault. [Aethel Abyssal Reaver]
Silence the summoning Channelers. [Aethel Void Channeler]

quests.title: Master of the Arcane
quests.description: The final trial for Master rank. (Location: Observatory Spire, Scholar Elara) Defeat the Ashen Drake and two elite guardians to gain access to the Arcanum's most restricted orbital archives.

objectives.description: Slay an Abyssal Reaver. [Aethel Abyssal Reaver]

quests.title: Echoes of the Past
quests.description: The Void Echo Chasm contains echoes of all knowledge ever lost. The Arcanum Seeker's greatest ambition: enter the chasm and retrieve what was forgotten. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

objectives.description: Collect void channeler core (x3). [Item: Void Channeler Core]

quests.title: Void Reaver Research
quests.description: Void Reavers are the most stable void entities. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Researcher Vin) Study them extensively — their nature may reveal how to safely harness void energy.

quests.title: Forbidden Rituals
quests.description: Ancient void rituals have been detected in the chasm depths. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Scholar Elara) The energy signatures match the Abyss Harbinger myth. Investigate with extreme caution.

objectives.description: Interrupt the forbidden void rituals. [Aethel Void Channeler]
Collect void channeler core (x3). [Item: Void Channeler Core]

quests.title: Abyssal Harvest
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers contain concentrated void essence — the most potent alchemical ingredient known. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Researcher Vin) Harvest them for the Arcanum's grand experiment.

objectives.description: Harvest Abyssal Reavers for void essence. [Aethel Abyssal Reaver]
Collect void channeler core (x3). [Item: Void Channeler Core]

quests.title: Behemoth Experiment
quests.description: Aethel Corrupted Behemoths in the chasm show signs of controlled mutation. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Researcher Vin) The Arcanum hypothesizes they were someone's experiment. Collect tissue for comparative analysis.

objectives.description: Defeat Corrupted Behemoths for tissue samples. [Aethel Corrupted Behemoth]
Collect raw aethel fragment (x1). [Item: Raw Aethel Fragment]

quests.title: Fragmented Souls
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters tear apart the boundary between consciousness and void. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum believes studying them could unlock the secrets of consciousness itself.

objectives.description: Defeat Soul Fragmenters for consciousness study.

quests.title: Chrono Anomaly
quests.description: Chrono Wraiths warp time around them. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Scholar Elara) If the Arcanum can understand their temporal mechanics, the implications for knowledge preservation are infinite.

objectives.description: Defeat Chrono Wraiths for temporal research.

quests.title: Jotunn Biology
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns are biological impossibilities. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Researcher Vin) Their existence defies known science. The Arcanum must study one up close.

objectives.description: Defeat a Gigantic Jotunn for biological study.

quests.title: Heart of Knowledge
quests.description: The Shattered Heart is the ultimate repository of Precursor knowledge. The Arcanum has waited centuries for this moment. Enter and claim what is ours. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: Siphoning the Drake
quests.description: The Ashen Drake's heart contains the secret of eternal fire — the ultimate alchemical catalyst. (Location: Shattered Heart, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum demands it. Raid Tier-1: claim the Drake's heart for the grand experiment.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake in its lair.
Clear Drake Minions from the lair.

quests.title: Fragmented Reality
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters are multiplying across the chasm. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Scholar Elara) Each one tears a hole in the fabric of consciousness. The Arcanum must contain them to prevent a reality cascade.

quests.title: Void Dominance
quests.description: The Arcanum initiates Operation Void Dominance. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Scholar Elara) All void signatures must be catalogued, contained, or eliminated. Knowledge of the void must be total.

objectives.description: Silence all remaining Void Channelers. [Aethel Void Channeler]

quests.title: Stalker of Secrets
quests.description: A Void Stalker has been hunting Arcanum researchers. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Scholar Elara) It seems to be drawn to those who carry Precursor knowledge. Turn the hunt around.

objectives.description: Track and defeat the Void Stalker.

quests.title: Temporal Paradox
quests.description: Chrono Wraiths are creating temporal loops within the chasm. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Researcher Vin) Each loop traps a piece of Precursor knowledge in an endless cycle. Break the loops.

objectives.description: Banish Chrono Wraiths from the temporal loops.

quests.title: Reaver Overflow
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers flood from the Shattered Heart. Each one carries traces of Precursor data. The Arcanum must collect them all. Quest giver: Archivist Sylas at Observatory Spire Archive.

objectives.description: Defeat Abyssal Reavers and extract data traces. [Aethel Abyssal Reaver]
Collect raw aethel fragment (x1). [Item: Raw Aethel Fragment]

quests.title: Jotunn Archive Guardians
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns in the Shattered Heart are not random — they guard something. The Arcanum believes a Precursor archive lies beneath their territory. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: Tyrant Archive
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants have claimed the Precursor archive as their territory. (Location: Shattered Heart, Scholar Elara) Their crystalline bodies have absorbed millennia of stored knowledge.

objectives.description: Defeat Crystal Tyrants at the Precursor archive.

quests.title: The Harbinger's Formula
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger is not just a monster — it is a living formula. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Scholar Elara) An equation of pure void given form. The Arcanum must record it before destroying it.

objectives.description: Cut through the Harbinger's vanguard. [Aethel Abyssal Reaver]
Defeat a Chrono Wraith to access the sanctum.
Collect raw aethel fragment (x1). [Item: Raw Aethel Fragment]

quests.title: Soul Harvest
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters are harvesting the souls of fallen researchers. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum cannot allow the accumulated knowledge of its members to be consumed.

objectives.description: Destroy Soul Fragmenters to free trapped souls.
Eliminate the Void Stalker directing the Fragmenters.

quests.title: The Harbinger's Secret
quests.description: THE ULTIMATE KNOWLEDGE TRIAL. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Scholar Elara) The Abyss Harbinger is a dimensional library — a living archive of forbidden knowledge. Defeat the Raid Boss Tier-2 entity and claim every secret it holds. Knowledge is Power. Secrets are Sovereignty.

quests.title: Seismic Research
quests.description: The Harbinger's defeat has triggered unprecedented seismic activity. (Location: Severance Faultline, Researcher Vin) The Arcanum sees opportunity: tectonic data may reveal the planet's deepest secrets.

quests.title: Tectonic Scanning
quests.description: Aethel Iron Carapaces are drawn to the fault's energy. (Location: Severance Faultline, Researcher Vin) Their shells contain compressed geological data spanning millions of years.

objectives.description: Defeat Iron Carapaces for geological data. [Aethel Iron Carapace]

quests.title: Tyrant Seismic
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants at the fault emit resonant frequencies that amplify seismic waves. (Location: Severance Faultline, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum hypothesizes they can be used as planetary-scale transmitters.

objectives.description: Defeat Crystal Tyrants for resonance study.

quests.title: Jotunn Migration
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns are migrating through the faultline. (Location: Severance Faultline, Scholar Elara) Their movement patterns correlate with Precursor navigation charts discovered in the Harbinger's archives.

quests.title: The Siphon Laboratory
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is the ultimate Precursor laboratory. The Arcanum has theorized its existence for centuries. Now it is discovered — claim it for science. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: Core Specimens
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers in the Core have been mutated by concentrated Aethel. (Location: Aethel Siphon Core, Researcher Vin) These mutations are scientifically invaluable.

objectives.description: Collect mutated Reaver specimens. [Aethel Abyssal Reaver]
Collect abyssal reaver claw (x1). [Item: Abyssal Reaver Claw]

quests.title: Behemoth Siege
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths assault the Core's primary conduits. (Location: Aethel Siphon Core, Scholar Elara) If the Core falls, the greatest Precursor laboratory is lost forever.

objectives.description: Defeat Corrupted Behemoths at the conduits. [Aethel Corrupted Behemoth]
Collect raw aethel fragment (x1). [Item: Raw Aethel Fragment]

quests.title: Rift Research
quests.description: Aethel Rift Stalkers create micro-rifts that offer glimpses into alternate dimensions. (Location: Aethel Siphon Core, Researcher Vin) The Arcanum must study these windows into other realities.

objectives.description: Defeat Rift Stalkers near active micro-rifts. [Aethel Rift Stalker]
Collect raw aethel fragment (x1). [Item: Raw Aethel Fragment]

quests.title: Titan's Formula
quests.description: The Gravity Titan's existence is a mathematical anomaly. (Location: Aethel Siphon Core, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum believes understanding its formula could revolutionize gravitational science.

objectives.description: Defeat a Jotunn drawn by Titan resonance. [Gigantic Jotunn]

quests.title: The Titan's Core
quests.description: THE GRAVITATIONAL TRIAL. (Location: Cradle Expanse, Scholar Elara) The Gravity Titan has risen. Its core is the most valuable scientific specimen in Xylos history. The Arcanum demands you retrieve it — intact. Defeat the Raid Boss Tier-3 entity and claim the Titan's gravitational heart for the eternal archives.

objectives.description: Clear the Titan's Abyssal escorts. [Aethel Abyssal Reaver]

quests.title: The Great Forge
quests.description: The Prima Materia Forge — the Precursor facility where reality itself can be shaped. The Arcanum's ultimate ambition: master the Forge and create legendary weapons. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: Forge Defenses
quests.description: Ancient Forge Automatons still defend the facility. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Researcher Vin) Disable them and reverse-engineer their construction — the Arcanum could replicate this technology.

objectives.description: Disable Forge defense automatons. [Aethel Iron Carapace]

quests.title: Forge Purification
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths contaminate the Forge's raw materials. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Scholar Elara) The purity of Prima Materia must be absolute for legendary crafting.

objectives.description: Purge Corrupted Behemoths from the Forge. [Aethel Corrupted Behemoth]
Collect raw aethel fragment (x3). [Item: Raw Aethel Fragment]

quests.title: Abyssal Contamination
quests.description: Void Channelers seek to corrupt the Forge. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Scholar Elara) Void-tainted Prima Materia would be catastrophic. Stop them at all costs.

objectives.description: Silence Void Channelers at the Forge core. [Aethel Void Channeler]

quests.title: Jotunn Forge-Masters
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns have learned to use the Forge's heat as a weapon. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Researcher Vin) Their mastery of the Forge's fire is concerning — and fascinating.

quests.title: Materia Synthesis
quests.description: The Arcanum initiates Operation Materia Synthesis. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Scholar Elara) The goal: produce the first Arcanum-crafted legendary weapon using Prima Materia.

objectives.description: Clear the Forge of hostile forces. [Aethel Void Channeler]
Collect void channeler core (x3). [Item: Void Channeler Core]

quests.title: Automaton Mastery
quests.description: Titan Forge Automatons are the apex of Precursor engineering. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Researcher Vin) The Arcanum must learn to control them rather than simply destroy them.

quests.title: Proto-Core Experiment
quests.description: A Titan Proto Core contains a failed Titan — the ultimate experimental subject. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Researcher Vin) The Arcanum must dissect it to understand Titan biology.

objectives.description: Destroy the Titan Proto Core for dissection.

quests.title: The Forge Complete
quests.description: The Forge is mastered. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Scholar Elara) The legendary weapon is forged. But the final test remains: prove the weapon's worth against the two greatest threats to Xylos.

objectives.description: Test the legendary weapon against the Gravity Titan.
Prove the weapon's worth against the Abyss Harbinger.

quests.title: Legendary Seeker
quests.description: You have defeated both Titan and Harbinger in a single campaign. The Arcanum Seekers recognize you as a Legendary Seeker. Return to the Observatory Spire. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: Apex Dominance
quests.description: The Hidden Aethelgardian City — a mythical Precursor metropolis. The Arcanum has triangulated its location using data from the Titan and Harbinger. Enter and claim its knowledge. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: City Defenses
quests.description: The city's automated defenses still function. (Location: Hidden Aethelgardian City, Researcher Vin) They do not distinguish between friend and foe — only threats to Precursor knowledge.

objectives.description: Disable city defense constructs. [Aethel Rift Stalker]
Collect raw aethel fragment (x1). [Item: Raw Aethel Fragment]

quests.title: The Eternal Library
quests.description: The city contains the Eternal Library — a Precursor repository of all knowledge. (Location: Hidden Aethelgardian City, Archivist Sylas) Download its contents for the Arcanum's grand archive.

objectives.description: Collect abyssal reaver claw (x5). [Item: Abyssal Reaver Claw]
Defeat Reavers drawn to the knowledge energy. [Aethel Abyssal Reaver]

quests.title: Apex Drake
quests.description: The Ashen Drake has evolved to its Apex form — a living repository of draconic knowledge. (Location: Shattered Heart, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum must study this ultimate form.

quests.title: Apex Harbinger
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger's rebirth brings new void-knowledge. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum must record its new form before destroying it forever.

quests.title: Apex Titan
quests.description: The Gravity Titan's third manifestation is its most powerful. (Location: Cradle Expanse, Scholar Elara) Its gravitational signature contains data from the planet's formation. The Arcanum must have it.

quests.title: Tri-Entity Research
quests.description: The three Apex entities — Drake, Titan, Harbinger — represent three branches of forbidden knowledge. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum authorizes their simultaneous study.

quests.title: The Siphon Overlord
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is now the Arcanum's primary research facility. Establish total control and begin the planetary energy calibration. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

objectives.description: Return to the Siphon Core as Overlord. (Travel to: Aethel Siphon Core, Shattered Heart)
Collect raw aethel fragment (x5). [Item: Raw Aethel Fragment]

quests.title: World Engine Discovery
quests.description: Beneath the Siphon Core lies the World Engine — the device that can reshape planetary reality. (Location: Aethel Siphon Core, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum's greatest discovery. Secure it absolutely.

objectives.description: Defeat Jotunns guarding the Engine. [Gigantic Jotunn]

quests.title: Knowledge Calibration
quests.description: The World Engine can be calibrated to broadcast knowledge across the planet. (Location: Aethel Siphon Core, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum's ultimate dream: a world where all knowledge is shared. Protect the calibration.

objectives.description: Defend the World Engine from Abyssal assault. [Aethel Abyssal Reaver]
Defeat Tyrants disrupting the calibration. [Crystal Tyrant]
Collect abyssal reaver claw (x1). [Item: Abyssal Reaver Claw]

quests.title: Jotunn Purge
quests.description: Residual hostile entities are being flushed by the World Engine. Begin the systematic purge at the Severance Faultline. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

objectives.description: Purge Jotunns from the faultline. [Gigantic Jotunn]

quests.title: Void Silence
quests.description: The Void is collapsing. (Location: Void Echo Chasm, Scholar Elara) The Arcanum must collect the final void data before it disappears forever. Every echo is precious.

objectives.description: Exterminate the final Abyssal Reavers. [Aethel Abyssal Reaver]
Collect void channeler core (x1). [Item: Void Channeler Core]

quests.title: Tyrant's Last Archive
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants in the Shattered Heart have absorbed the last remaining Precursor archives. Extract the knowledge from their crystalline bodies. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

quests.title: Forge Completion
quests.description: The Forge will be the Arcanum's eternal workshop. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Scholar Elara) Purify the last remaining contamination and seal the facility.

objectives.description: Silence the last Void Channelers. [Aethel Void Channeler]
Disable rogue Forge Automatons. [Titan Forge Automaton]

quests.title: Expanse Dominion
quests.description: The Cradle Expanse is now Arcanum research territory. Enforce our intellectual sovereignty with overwhelming arcane power. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

objectives.description: Clear all hostiles from the Expanse. [Aethel Rift Stalker]
Destroy any residual Titan manifestations. [Gravity Titan]

quests.title: Eternal Vigil
quests.description: From orbit, the Arcanum watches over Xylos — the planet that is now our greatest library. (Location: Orbital Sentinel Command, Scholar Elara) Maintain eternal vigilance over our domain of knowledge.

objectives.description: Patrol and secure orbital sectors. [Aethel Iron Carapace]
Eliminate any remaining Corrupted Behemoths. [Aethel Corrupted Behemoth]

quests.title: The Final Formula
quests.description: The collected knowledge from all sources forms the Final Formula — the unified theory of Xylos. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Scholar Elara) Channel all accumulated Arcanum knowledge into its completion.

objectives.description: Defeat Jotunns resisting the Final Formula. [Gigantic Jotunn]
Destroy the Harbinger's final echo. [Abyss Harbinger]

quests.title: The Final Convergence
quests.description: Only the ultimate test remains. (Location: Prima Materia Forge, Scholar Elara) Face the three Apex entities — Jotunn, Drake, and Harbinger — and from their essences forge the Key of Absolute Knowledge.

quests.title: Sovereign of Secrets
quests.description: The deepest Void Echo Chasm holds the final secret — the truth of Xylos's creation. Descend one final time and claim the ultimate knowledge. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

objectives.description: Descend to the deepest chasm level. (Travel to: Void Echo Chasm)
Defeat the eternal form of Gravity Titan.
Destroy the eternal form of Abyss Harbinger.

quests.title: Eternity of Knowledge
quests.description: You have done the impossible. You hold the Sovereign Seal. Return to the Observatory Spire where all of the Arcanum Seekers await. You are no longer a Seeker. You are the SOVEREIGN OF SECRETS. Knowledge is Power. Secrets are Sovereignty. Now and forever. Quest giver: Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing.

objectives.description: Return to the Observatory Spire as the Sovereign of Secrets.
Receive the highest honors from High Seeker Elara. (Scholar Elara at Observatory Spire Research Wing)
